heading: Atlas Limits
body:
Atlas limits the number of the following items:

- Components of particular type that you can create.

- Connections allowed to a cluster. For
  clusters, the number of connections allowed depends on the
  cluster tier.

- Global Cluster shard keys per [project](projects). Each
  Atlas project supports up to 40 Global Cluster shard keys.
  If you require multiple Global Clusters and might exceed
  this limit, deploy each additional Global Cluster in a
  separate project.

To learn more, see [Atlas Service Limits](atlas-limits). For questions or assistance, contact support:
